title: Urban Living CONSERVATION JAR 8LTR WITH LID AND RED HANDLE D19XH34CM
features: 8L LARGE CAPACITY - This jar is designed to store large amounts of food, making it perfect for families or kitchens where it is important to store large volumes of food products.
Airtight Lid: The leak-proof lid prevents moisture and air from entering, ensuring better preservation of food and extending its shelf life.
ERGONOMIC RED HANDLE - The handy red handle makes it easy to carry the jar, even when filled, and add a splash of color to your kitchen.
Strong and durable materials: This jar is made of quality materials, providing maximum impact resistance and ensuring long lasting durability even after frequent use.
description: This 8L jar is perfect for storing food in large quantities, such as cereals, nuts or rice. With its practical design and large capacity, it allows you to keep your food fresh and dry while maximizing storage space. The red handle makes it easy to transport, and the airtight lid ensures optimal storage of the products.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Do not put in the dishwasher, can be put in the microwave, and is suitable for storing food in the refrigerator
specifications_table.Specific uses for product: ‎Kitchen, food preservation, food storage, home preservation, preserving in pots
